entity.label: Brook Kidron
entity.subtitle: Valley
entity.description: The black torrent, the brook flowing through the ravine below the eastern wall of Jerusalem (John 18:1).

nodes.label: Brook Kidron
nodes.description: The black torrent, the brook flowing through the ravine below the eastern wall of Jerusalem (John 18:1).

verses.text: And they arose and took away the altars that were in Jerusalem, and all the altars for incense took they away, and cast them into the brook Kidron.
When Jesus had spoken these words, he went forth with his disciples over the brook Cedron, where was a garden, into the which he entered, and his disciples.
